comment.body:
This issue is known to be solved with [AdGuard Extra](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardExtra) userscript.

If you’re using AdGuard for Windows, Mac or Android, please make sure that AdGuard Extra is enabled in the application settings.

If you’re using AdGuard Browser Extension, we suggest installing AdGuard Extra in addition to it.

* [Install for Chrome, Edge or other Chromium-based browsers](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_chrome_release)
* [Install for Firefox](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_firefox_release)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://himalayawellness.in/products/natural-moisturizing-lip-butter](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fhimalayawellness.in%2Fproducts%2Fnatural-moisturizing-lip-butter) ### Comment > COOKIES, AND WIDGETS (bottom right) > > For the cookies: > `himalayawellness.in##.otCookiesNotification` > > ^This hides the cookies overlay, but doesn't accept/decline it. (might need a more reliable solution as the payment methods break unexpectedly, but cookies aren't really needed here anyway so...) > > For the Chat widget: > `himalayawellness.in##.asksid-web-chat` > ^long-term fix, additional overlay fix on future changes to the url > > `https://cdn.asksid.ai/himalaya/Care_icon.svg$domain=himalayawellness.in` > ^more surgical fix, saves data from loading trackers ### Screenshots

issue.title: False positive: Overbroad rule blocking URLs with qtag parameter
issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard for Safari ### AdGuard version latest ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed ads or ad leftovers, Website or app doesn't work properly ### Which browser(s) do you use? Safari ### Which device do you use? Desktop ### Where is the problem encountered? https://test-analytics-side.com/page?qtag=123&x_pm_click=456 ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Privacy AdGuard URL Tracking filter ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? Protect from DPI ### Add your comment and screenshots Hello. There is an overbroad rule in the AdGuard Base filter that triggers a full-page block screen on web pages utilizing specific analytics/tracking parameters. Triggered Rule: ?qtag=*&x_pm_click=$all Example of blocked structure: https://your-website.com/dir/page?qtag=value&x_pm_click=value Issue: > This rule completely blocks access to pages for users if the URL contains these parameters. However, qtag and x_pm_click are used for internal traffic routing, partner source tracking, and analytics. Because this is a generic rule in the Base Filter, it causes false positives and breaks legitimate user navigation across web resources. Please consider narrowing down this rule or removing it from the global Base filter. Thank you! ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: bild.de

labels.name: A: By Design
labels.description: The issue cannot be resolved due to technical, ethic, or legal reasons

issue.body:
## Information

### Deutsch

Sehr geehrte Benutzerin, sehr geehrter Benutzer, aufgrund von Gesetzen ([z. B. die Gerichtsentscheidung in Karlsruhe, Deutschland im Jahre 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html)) ist es leider nicht möglich diese Paywall (Adblock-Erkennung) zu umgehen. Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis.

### English

Dear user, due to a court decision ([eg the court ruling in Karlsruhe, Germany in 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html) ) it is unfortunately not possible to bypass this paywall (adblock detection). Thank you for your understanding.

comment.body:
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/177194#issuecomment-4733574507

Can we have at least a statement? Back then we got a user filter.
Even when I subscribe the uAssets filter that contain all the Bild.de Anti Adblock filters, the visit of the page fail: https://github.com/uBlockOrigin/uAssets/blob/master/filters/filters.txt

My guess is, that there is some filter added in AdGuard filters that triggers the Anti Adblock for no reason. Can you please check this?
